ew_context: Price appears to be completing wave B of a corrective structure, with double top formation signaling potential wave C decline
pattern_desc: Well-defined double top pattern with highs at 0.7959 and 0.7951, showing clear rejection at resistance around 0.7950 level
key_levels: Resistance: 0.7951 (pattern high), 0.7950 (key resistance). Support: 0.7935 (pattern target), 0.7921 (measured move)
invalidation: Break above 0.7956 (stop loss) would negate the bearish pattern and suggest continuation higher
market_context: CAD strength amid geopolitical tensions affecting oil prices, while NZD faces headwinds from risk-off sentiment and dovish RBNZ expectations
